title: Tempting Smoky Ethiopian Fish Azifa
description: A smoky and crunchy Ethiopian dish featuring dashi and fish, served on a cedar plank, perfect for a crowd, this pescatarian friendly azifa is a real showstopper.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium high heat.
In a large bowl, whisk together dashi powder, lemon juice, olive oil, garlic, ginger, berbere spice, salt, and black pepper.
Add the fish fillets to the bowl and marinate for at least 30 minutes.
Remove the fish from the marinade and place on the cedar planks.
Place the cedar planks on the grill and cook for 4 minutes per side.
After flipping the fish, sprinkle with additional berbere spice if desired.
Once the fish is cooked through, remove from the grill and let rest for 2 minutes.
Serve the fish on the cedar planks, garnished with lemon wedges and fresh herbs if desired.
